# Usability Testing Scripts — Reference Assets

This directory contains structured test scenarios, task scripts, and scoring rubrics for mobile app usability validation.

## Contents

### Test Scenarios
- Participant screening questionnaire template
- Pre-test briefing script
- Task scenario templates (discovery, navigation, completion tasks)
- Post-test debrief script

### Scoring Rubrics
- Task completion scoring rubric
- Time-on-task benchmarks
- Error classification rubric
- Satisfaction/confidence rating scale

### Analysis Tools
- Data collection spreadsheet template
- Affinity mapping template
- Finding synthesis template
- Recommendation prioritization matrix

### Participant Management
- Participant recruitment checklist
- Consent form template
- Participant tracking spreadsheet
- Incentive tracking template

## Usage

Reference these materials when:
- Designing usability test sessions (5+ participants)
- Structuring task workflows for consistency
- Scoring and analyzing participant performance
- Synthesizing findings into actionable recommendations

## Contributing

Add new test scenarios and rubrics based on validated testing patterns.
